variants.title: H/V distant-signal repeater
variants.purpose: Repeats the indication of a distant signal where visibility or local conditions require another display.
playerAction: Treat the repeated Vr indication as confirmation of the warning already received.
Do not assume that a fresh full braking distance begins at the repeater.

notes: The exact supplementary marker and physical arrangement represented in each TSW route must be recorded from direct observation.

variants.title: H/V warning at shortened braking distance
variants.purpose: Indicates that the distance to the associated main signal is shorter than the normal braking distance.
playerAction: React promptly to the Vr indication.
Expect less distance than normal to comply with the announced main-signal condition.

notes: The route-specific board or supplementary-light implementation must be verified in TSW before artwork is finalised.
